summary: Classified the five open PRs independently as requested for this live inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive item was detected, and no close/merge/fix action is planned.

actions.reason: Open focused PR with proof and passing checks; not a duplicate, superseded PR, low-signal PR, or closure candidate in this shard.
Maintainer-owned draft/WIP compatibility PR with incomplete enrichment; keep open for owner/maintainer review.
Small focused test robustness PR with unique Windows symlink coverage; failing checks mean it should stay open for normal PR follow-up, not inventory closeout.
Distinct QQ Bot test robustness PR with enough evidence to keep open; not a duplicate or closeout candidate.
Substantive behavior/config PR with active author-followup signal and compatibility risk; keep open for normal review, not backlog closeout.
